economic_notes: First Nation holds 8.3% interest in Keseechiwan Holdings LP and FHQTC Developments LP. Owns 100% of New Horizon First Nations Administration Inc., Nekaneet First Nation Investment Holdings Ltd., Nekaneet Management Ltd., and Nekaneet Holdings GP Ltd. Member of File Hills Qu'Appelle Tribal Council (11 nations). TC Keystone Pipeline LP distributions received.
notes: Comparative 2021 figures were restated (Note 26) due to a qualified opinion issued by a prior auditor; matter resolved in current year. Consolidated entity includes CMHC Housing Fund. Four GBEs accounted for under modified equity method (New Horizon First Nations Administration Inc., Nekaneet First Nation Investment Holdings Ltd., Nekaneet Management Ltd., Nekaneet Holdings GP Ltd.). Two limited partnerships (Keseechiwan Holdings LP and FHQTC Developments LP) accounted for under modified equity method as government business partnerships. Keseechiwan Holdings LP investment written down to $1 as withdrawals exceeded partner capital. Net book value of tangible capital assets per Note 12 is $8,140,494 vs $8,198,122 on balance sheet — minor discrepancy likely due to rounding or assets under construction treatment. Total government transfers calculated as ISC $4,595,006 + CMHC $486,355 + FHQTC $384,807 + Ottawa Trust $131,764 + First Nations Trust $101,461 + Government of Saskatchewan $25,765 = $5,725,158. Unexpended revenue (deferred revenue) balance of $1,297,268 recorded as liability. Operating fund deficit of $3,548,158.
